prose:
**Benzaldehyde Fukui Reactivity Descriptors** — DFT (RKS) at B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier `standard`, density-fit off) in PySCF via chemkit; gas phase; charge 0; multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied from benzaldehyde.xyz (single-point, no optimization). SCF converged; no engine warnings beyond integrity checks. 
Most electrophilic site: C atom 3 (1-based), f⁺ = 0.39938962 (Mulliken).
Most nucleophilic site: O atom 1, f⁻ = 0.23839906 (Mulliken).

Command:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz \
  --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults \
  --out benzaldehyde_fukui_dft.json --stdout path
```
Live .out log: fukui_20260704-180352.out (live, tailable). Plot: /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/argo_o4-mini/20260704-180352_benzaldehyde_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png.
